title: Google Engineer Fired After Leaking Sentient AI
summary: This interview discusses Blake Lemoine, a Google engineer who was fired after leaking transcripts of conversations with Google's LaMDA chatbot, which he believed to be sentient. The discussion covers the ethical implications of advanced AI technology and public involvement in technological development.

events.description: Blake Lemoine publicly expressed ethical concerns about LaMDA's sentience and leaked conversation transcripts, resulting in his termination from Google

key_claims.claim: This AI technology is so advanced it might define the next hundred years
Blake Lemoine was terminated by Google after leaking transcripts of conversations with LaMDA
